hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat - | jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *"rm -rf"*) echo "⛔ Use trash-cli or mv to trash instead of rm -rf" >&2; exit 2;; *"git push"*main*|*"git push"*master*) echo "⛔ Push to feature branch first, not main/master" >&2; exit 2;; *"git push -f"*|*"git push --force"*) echo "⚠️ Force push detected — use --force-with-lease instead" >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat - | jq -r .tool_input.file_path 2>/dev/null); EXT="${FILE##*.}"; case "$EXT" in ts|tsx|js|jsx) if command -v npx &>/dev/null && [ -f "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)/node_modules/.bin/eslint" ]; then npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi;; py) if command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi;; esac; exit 0'

bash -c 'MSG=$(cat - | jq -r .message 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$OSTYPE" == darwin* ]]; then osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code\"" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send "Claude Code" "$MSG" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
